children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may promulgate such regulations as are necessary to implement this title and the amendments made by this title.11See References in Text note below.1
the notice and comment provisions of ;section 553 of title 5
the Statement of Policy of the Secretary of Agriculture effective (36 Fed. Reg. 13804), relating to notices of proposed rulemaking and public participation in rulemaking; andJuly 24, 1971
chapter 35 of title 44 (commonly known as the “Paperwork Reduction Act”).

children.heading: Congressional review of agency rulemaking
children.label: c Congressional review of agency rulemaking
children.text: In carrying out this section, the Secretary shall use the authority provided under .section 808 of title 5
